suites.command: bun --cwd packages/coding-agent test test/transcript-item-registry.test.ts test/action-registry.test.ts test/keybinding-domains.test.ts test/keybindings-audit.test.ts

adversarialCases.scenario: Same stream ordinal in distinct generations; endStream for unknown and retired provisional ids.
adversarialCases.expected: Generations remain isolated; invalid rebinds register nothing; retired payload is unresolvable.

adversarialCases.scenario: Resolve a stream alias after normal completion, then evict; rebuild and switch sessions.
adversarialCases.expected: Alias resolves only while its canonical item exists and is cleared by eviction, rebuild, and session change.

adversarialCases.scenario: Replace one read-group membership while another group overlaps a tool ID.
adversarialCases.expected: Each group retains only its current source and tool membership; no cross-group leakage.

adversarialCases.scenario: Reveal with zero terminal dimensions and with no rendered anchor frame.
Reveal short content at top/center/bottom, repeat a reveal, then remove an anchored row.
adversarialCases.expected: Short content remains visible, repeated reveal is stable, removed anchor returns false without viewport mutation.

adversarialCases.scenario: Reveal an off-screen anchor in width-sensitive text.
adversarialCases.expected: Rendered anchor lines remain byte-identical before and after reveal.

adversarialCases.scenario: Register identical action twice and invoke a pending async action concurrently.
adversarialCases.expected: Duplicate registration throws; second execution returns false and cannot interleave.

adversarialCases.scenario: Availability predicate throws, unavailable action is invoked, and execute rejects.
adversarialCases.expected: Errors are reported through showError, unavailable execute is a no-op, and no rejection escapes execute().
